description: The S.H.I.E.L.D. strike team maneuvers through the mining town's outskirts following May's lead from James. They discover the Kree beacon in the mining facility, prompting Coulson to order an emergency extraction as something massive approaches from above. The intensity rises as the Kree Reapers crash down, setting the stage for the ensuing chaos.

transcript.line: Why take over a town and then move to the outskirts?
I don't know, but the reason's probably not good. Remember, this is Hive. Be prepared to go in hot. Safeties off.
I was hoping to spare you this, but it was the only way. They're coming for us.
Sounds like some kind of radio.
That's definitely no radio I've ever seen.
Get everyone out of there now!
You heard him! Move out! Go! Go! Move it!
